markets.question: Will Elaine Culotti advance from the 2026 California Governor primary election?
markets.description:
The non-partisan primary election for Governor of California is scheduled to take place on June 2, 2026. The top two candidates in this election by number of votes won will advance to the general election for Governor of California.

This market will resolve to “Yes” If the listed candidate advances from the primary to the general election for Governor of California. Otherwise this market will resolve to “No”.

If no 2026 California gubernatorial primary takes place by December 31, 2026, this market will resolve to “No.”

This market will resolve based on the results of the primary election for Governor of California as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the government of California, specifically the Office of the Secretary of State.

events.title: Who will advance from the California Governor primary?

This market will resolve based on the results of the primary election for Governor of California as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the government of California, specifically the Office of the Secretary of State.

markets.question: Spread: FC Nordsjælland (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Denmark Superliga game, scheduled for April 7 at 1:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "FC Nordsjælland" if FC Nordsjælland win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Brøndby IF".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on superligaen.dk. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: FC Nordsjælland vs. Brøndby IF: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Denmark Superliga game between FC Nordsjælland and Brøndby IF, scheduled for April 7 at 1:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if FC Nordsjælland and Brøndby IF combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on superligaen.dk. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: FC Nordsjælland vs. Brøndby IF: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Denmark Superliga game between FC Nordsjælland and Brøndby IF, scheduled for April 7 at 1:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both FC Nordsjælland and Brøndby IF each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on superligaen.dk. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: XRP Up or Down - March 12, 12:25PM-12:30PM ET
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the XRP price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the XRP/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/xrp-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream XRP/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

markets.question: Will Clavicular be the top ranked Chad by March 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Clavicular holds the #1 rank position on officialchadrankings.com between market creation and March 31, 2026, 11:59PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If Clavicular holds the #1 spot in the official chad rankings at any point within this market's timeframe, this market will immediately resolve to "Yes".

The resolution source for this market will be officialchadrankings.com. If the resolution source becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve to "No".

events.title: Will Clavicular be the top ranked Chad by March 31?
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Clavicular holds the #1 rank position on officialchadrankings.com between market creation and March 31, 2026, 11:59PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If Clavicular holds the #1 spot in the official chad rankings at any point within this market's timeframe, this market will immediately resolve to "Yes".

The resolution source for this market will be officialchadrankings.com. If the resolution source becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve to "No".
